# Pattern Blueprint: [Pattern Name]

## 1. System Design Mapping
* **Macro System Component:** [e.g., Token Bucket Rate Limiter, LSM compaction stream deduplication]
* **How it leverages this DSA Pattern:** [e.g., How the micro algorithmic pattern optimizes the macro system component's bottlenecks.]
* **Data Flow Architecture:** A high-level explanation of how data traverses the component and is manipulated by the algorithmic bounds.

## 2. High-Yield Performance Tricks (Java Specific)
* **Memory & Collection Strategy:** [e.g., Avoid boxed types, prefer arrays or flat primitive heaps over standard collection classes, pre-allocate buffers where dimensions are bounded.]
* **Time/Space Constraints:** Detailed Time & Space complexity bounds under high throughput.
* **Garbage Collection (GC) Impact:** How to design the class structure to minimize JVM GC pressure (e.g., reusing objects, pool allocations, zero object creation in critical path loops).
